output.setting: The Sunken Necropolis, a decaying city beneath miles of black water

pickup.name: Vial of Blight
pickup.effect: Increases damage against organic bio-matter

encounters.trigger: The death of the crab causes its shell to shatter, revealing the path to the Blackened Reef

pickup.name: Ancient Anchor
pickup.effect: Allows the player to tether and immobilize heavy enemies

encounters.trigger: The spectral light emitted by the dying eel alerts the Guardian of the Forgotten Altar

pickup.name: Abyssal Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the inner sanctum where the Leviathan sleeps

encounters.trigger: Inserting the key into the sanctum gate wakes the Primordial Leviathan

boss.name: Primordial Leviathan
boss.victory_condition: Channel the corruption from the Abyssal Key into the Leviathan's heart to banish it

output.objective: Banish the Leviathan from the sacred trench to reclaim the Necropolis

output.setting: A decaying, high-pressure research facility at the bottom of the Mariana Trench.

pickup.name: Conductivity Coil
pickup.effect: Increases electrical conductivity on enemies

encounters.trigger: Defeating the crab disables the electromagnetic lock on the next chamber.

pickup.name: Focused Crystal Core
pickup.effect: Focuses lightning into a piercing beam

encounters.trigger: The death of the eel opens the blast doors to the central core.

pickup.name: Ancient Resonance Tuning Fork
pickup.effect: Generates a frequency to destabilize the boss shield

encounters.trigger: Retrieving the Tuning Fork activates the containment breach sequence, awakening the boss.

boss.name: Leviathan Prime
boss.victory_condition: Disrupt the Leviathan's protective field using the Tuning Fork before delivering the final strike.

output.objective: Escape the trench before the facility collapses.

output.setting: The abyssal ruins of Station Echo-9 at the bottom of the Mariana Trench

pickup.name: Thermal Battery
pickup.effect: Applies a searing heat modifier to the Harpoon Pike

encounters.trigger: Deactivation of the gate lock allows access to the bioluminescent trench

pickup.name: Sonic Emitter
pickup.effect: Produces a frequency that vibrates armor, exposing weak points

encounters.trigger: Opening the trench bulkhead initiates the core elevator sequence

pickup.name: Ancient Keycard
pickup.effect: Overrides the shielding protocols on the Void Leviathan

encounters.trigger: Inserting the keycard into the override terminal summons the boss

boss.name: Void Leviathan
boss.victory_condition: Use the Ancient Keycard to collapse the boss shielding and land a killing blow

output.objective: Purge the station of corrupted entities and neutralize the Leviathan

pickup.name: Eternal Heart

encounters.trigger: Slaughtering the Shadow Serpent opens the sealed sanctum of the Lich King.

boss.name: The Verdant Lich
boss.victory_condition: Crush the Eternal Heart on the Lich's altar to sever his link to the jungle and dissipate his form.

output.objective: Cleanse the jungle by dismantling the Lich's necromantic anchors and destroying his vessel.
output.reward: The Necromancer's Crown of Thorns, providing permanent life-steal on all attacks.
